notes:
v1.1.3 Patch
🐛 Custom organization logos on ID cards no longer collapse into a thin vertical line. Logos now keep a fixed square slot in the card header and scale proportionally inside it.

announcement.title: 🪪 ID Card App v1.1.3
announcement.content:
ID Card App v1.1.3 fixes custom organization logos.

  • Custom logos no longer collapse into a thin vertical line in the card header.
  • Logos now keep a fixed square slot and scale proportionally inside it.
